name: PyPI API
description: The Python Package Index (PyPI) API provides read-only access to package metadata, release information, and download URLs for Python packages hosted on PyPI. The API includes a JSON API for structured metadata and a Simple API (PEP 503) for package file listings. All endpoints are publicly accessible and require no authentication.
